'''Wuwuhuul''' was a [[Revwien/Legends|Revwien]] [[Thuwisten]] who was the longtime companion of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] sympathizer and former [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Grindol Maal]].

Eager for a scrap with the forces of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], Maal and Wuwuhuul volunteered to accompany a Rebel strike team to [[Goratak III]] to [[Mission to Goratak III|recover]] a downed [[I2-CG droid/Legends|I2-CG]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]] with critical information about Rebel [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] manufacturing operations on [[Tar Morden]].

At the time of this engagement, Wuwuhuul was 7 seasons old, stood 1.88 meters tall, and weighed just over 54 kilograms. Though most Thuwisten were unfamiliar with the ways of the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]], Wuwuhuul possessed a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]].
